### Daily Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — daily at 9:00. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Slot Free?

### Slot Free?

Two-way gate on `={{ $items().length === 0 || !$json.id }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Record Booking · ②→ Propose Alternative Slots

### Record Booking

notion — `create` operation against the connected account.

Next: Send Confirmation (Outlook)

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Notion integration token

### Send Confirmation (Outlook)

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Hold Until Reminder Time

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Propose Alternative Slots

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Hold Until Reminder Time

Pauses 1 hours — spacing calls to respect rate limits.

Next: Send Reminder (Outlook)

### Send Reminder (Outlook)

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

# Re-engage open deals with Notion and Outlook automatically

**Pattern:** Reminders & Follow-ups · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Re-engage open deals with Notion and Outlook automatically. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual newsletters is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Slot Free? → Record Booking → Send Confirmation (Outlook) → Hold Until Reminder Time → Send Reminder (Outlook) → Save Execution Metadata

## Use it for
- Teams that want to reminders & follow-ups without manual effort
- Anyone automating newsletters in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Microsoft OAuth2; Notion integration token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your newsletters process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
